name: Leg-Press Calf Raise
resistance_profile: Straight-leg plantarflexion on the leg press; heavy-loadable gastrocnemius work.
cues: Balls of the feet on the platform
execution_steps: Sit in the leg press and place the balls of your feet low on the platform, heels off the edge
Extend your legs nearly straight and release the safety catches
Let the platform push your toes back into a full ankle stretch
Press through the balls of your feet to full plantarflexion
Pause at the bottom stretch, then move under control
good_when: You want heavy, spine-free loading for the gastrocnemius
A standing calf machine is unavailable
Balance or stability limits standing variations
bad_when: You want to target the soleus (bent-knee seated raise is better)
